content:
The Chrome DevTools MCP server is still failing to connect because it explicitly looks for the `DevToolsActivePort` file in the default `C:\Users\smile\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data\` directory, which it cannot find. 

However, since you mentioned Chrome is running with remote debugging on port 9222, I will write a Python script to directly communicate with the Chrome DevTools Protocol via port 9222 to access the page and retrieve the video information. I will get back to you shortly with the summary.

toolCall.name: send_message
